summary: Bilingual services agreement between Digital Horizon Technology Solutions Co. and Najd Logistics & Supply Chain Co. for a cloud fleet-tracking platform valued at SAR 480,000.
transcription:
Ref. No: DH-AGR-2026-0184
Date: 11 February 2026

Professional Services Agreement

This Professional Services Agreement is entered into and made effective as of 1 March 2026 by and between Digital Horizon Technology Solutions Co. (First Party) and Najd Logistics & Supply Chain Co. (Second Party).

Scope of Services: cloud-based fleet-tracking platform including data migration and staff training.

Contract Value: SAR 480,000 exclusive of VAT.

Term: twelve (12) months from the Effective Date.

Confidentiality and Governing Law: Saudi Arabia, competent courts in Riyadh.

fields.label: Confidentiality Clause
fields.value: Each party shall keep confidential all proprietary information disclosed during the term and for three years thereafter.

source.snippet: Each party shall keep confidential all proprietary information

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.value: Laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia; disputes referred to competent courts in Riyadh.

source.snippet: governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

notes: Prepared extraction aligned to 01_Services_Agreement.pdf for offline demo.
Bilingual layout — verify Arabic clauses during human review.
